# UC-12.2.30 · Argo CD ApplicationSet Generator Matrix Empty or Error

## Description

Broken generators stop multi-cluster rollouts silently.

## Value

Catches ApplicationSet failures that would orphan clusters from GitOps updates.

## Implementation

Tag controller logs with cluster label; correlate with SCM API rate limits.

## SPL

```spl
index=devops sourcetype="argocd:applicationset" OR (sourcetype="argocd:server" ApplicationSet*)
| search "ApplicationSet" AND ("error" OR "failed" OR "generator")
| stats latest(_time) as t, count by name, namespace
| sort -count
```

## Visualization

Table (ApplicationSet × error count), Single value (open failures).

## References

- [Argo CD Splunk integration notes](https://github.com/argoproj/argo-cd/wiki/Splunk)
